data.description: Week Ahead: Economic Indicators 25th – 29th August (US)

data.title: Joe Schierhorn retired as Board Chair of Northrim BanCorp, Inc. Mike Huston to succeed on Jan 1, 2026 after being President & CEO since 2024.
data.description: In a recent board meeting, Joe Schierhorn declared his retirement from Northrim BanCorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: NRIM), effective from December 31, 2025. Following a succession plan, Mike Huston, the current President & CEO, will take over as Chairman of the Board for Northrim Bank and the Company starting January 1, 2026, alongside his existing roles. Huston, who has been part of the company since 2017 and held the positions of President from 2022 and President & CEO from 2024, will be succeeding Schierhorn.

data.title: Rail Vision (Nasdaq: RVSN) reports H1 2025 financial results, aiming to revolutionize railway safety and data market.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, Rail Vision Ltd. (Nasdaq: RVSN) announced its financial results for the first half of the year ending on June 30, 2025. Rail Vision, based in Ra’anana, Israel, is an early-stage technology company focused on transforming railway safety and data analytics. The company is working towards innovation in these areas to enhance the railway industry.

data.title: Movano Health (Nasdaq: MOVE) faces Nasdaq deficiency notice for delayed quarterly report filing on Form 10-Q.
data.description: In Pleasanton, California on August 22, 2025, Movano Health (listed as MOVE on Nasdaq) disclosed receiving a notice from Nasdaq's Listing Qualifications Department. The notice highlighted the Company's failure to submit its required filings.

data.title: enCore Energy Corp. raises $115 million in Senior Convertible Notes offering, solidifying position as America's Clean Energy Company™.
data.description: enCore Energy Corp., a leading clean energy company trading on NASDAQ under EU and TSXV under EU, has successfully completed its latest offering of $115 million aggregate principal amount. The announcement was made on August 22, 2025, from Dallas. More information can be found on their official website at www.encoreuranium.com.

data.title: Broadway Financial Corp notified by Nasdaq for late filing of Form 10-Q on Aug. 21, 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, in Los Angeles, Broadway Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: BYFC), the parent company of City First Bank, National Association, revealed that it had been contacted by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on August 21, 2025.

data.title: WesBanco (Nasdaq: WSBC) declares $0.37/share quarterly cash dividend for common stockholders.
data.description: In Wheeling, West Virginia, on August 22, 2025, WesBanco, Inc. (Nasdaq: WSBC), a multi-state bank holding company, reported that their Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.37 per share for common stockholders. The dividend will...
US bank deposits rose to $18.368 tln from $18.328 tln in the prior week.

data.title: FiscalNote will implement a 1:12 reverse stock split for their common stock.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, a significant decrease from the previous month's 5.2%. This decline has resulted in 300,000 new jobs being created in various sectors. The labor force participation rate has also increased to 63.8%, showcasing more people entering the workforce. Economists predict that this trend is likely to continue in the upcoming months, indicating a positive outlook for the country's economy. In addition, hourly wages have seen a modest increase of 2.5%, providing further support to workers in the current economic climate.

data.title: ASA Gold and Precious Metals Limited sees resignation of Directors William Donovan and Mary Joan Hoene, appoints Karen Caldwell as new director and Chair of Audit & Ethics Committee. Karen will serve until the 2025 Shareholders' Meeting.
data.description: ASA Gold and Precious Metals Limited disclosed that two Directors, William Donovan and Mary Joan Hoene, have stepped down from the Board of Directors. Simultaneously, Ms. Karen Caldwell has been named as a Director until the 2025 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders. Additionally, she has been chosen as the Chair of the Company’s Audit and Ethics Committee. Ms. Caldwell will also serve as an "audit commi".

data.title: Foot Locker shareholders approve merger with DICK'S Sporting Goods with 99% of votes in favor.
data.description: Foot Locker, Inc. ("Foot Locker") revealed that an overwhelming 99% of votes were in favor of the merger agreement with DICK'S Sporting Goods, Inc. The announcement was made in New York on August 22, 2025. Shareholders of Foot Locker voted in favor of the acquisition, propelling the deal forward. The approval signals a strong mandate from shareholders with only a negligible dissenting percentage. This decisive approval underscores the confidence and support shareholders have in the merger.

data.title: Top KingWin Ltd. faces Nasdaq delisting due to share price below $1 for 30 days, reversing stock split in May in violation.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on August 22, 2025, Top KingWin Limited's announcement revealed the receipt of a delisting notification from Nasdaq on August 18, 2025. The notification stated that Nasdaq would delist the company's class A ordinary shares from The Nasdaq Capital Market due to the bid price closing at less than $1 per share over 30 consecutive business days. This action was taken as the company failed to comply with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). Typically, a 180-calendar day compliance period would be allowed, but as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810(c)(3)(A)(iv), Top KingWin is not eligible for this grace period. This ineligibility stems from a reverse stock split undertaken by the company in May 2025, occurring within the last year.

data.title: ABM will announce Q3 2025 financial results on September 5, 2025, at 8:30 AM in a conference call.
data.description: A conference call has been scheduled for September 5, 2025, at 8:30 AM Eastern Time. This call is set to take place on the specified date and time, providing an opportunity for participants to engage in discussions or receive updates. The timing of the call is crucial for attendees to ensure their availability, as it will commence promptly at the designated hour. Participants are encouraged to mark their calendars and make a note of this important event.

data.title: Zscaler (NASDAQ: ZS) to present at investor conferences; leaders in cloud security. Management team to present upcoming events.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, Zscaler, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZS), a prominent figure in cloud security based in San Jose, California, revealed their plans to present at various investor conferences. The management team of Zscaler, Inc. is set to participate in these events to discuss the company's outlook and strategies for the future. Specific information regarding the dates and locations of the conferences will be provided in subsequent announcements.

data.title: TeraWulf Inc. fully exercises Greenshoe in $1.0 billion Convertible Senior Notes Offering, with additional $150M purchased.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, TeraWulf Inc. (Nasdaq: WULF) disclosed that they are a prominent owner and operator of mainly zero-carbon digital infrastructure. The company made public that the initial purchasers of their 1.00% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031 have opted to fully purchase an additional $150 million aggregate principal amount of notes. This decision was made on August 21, 2025, and the transaction was finalized on August 22, 2025. With the exercise of the greenshoe option, the entire principal sum of Convertible Notes sold during the offering reached $1.0 billion.

data.title: Diginex updates on MOU for ADX dual listing, potential USD$250 million capital raise, and expansion in UAE and GCC.
data.description: Diginex Limited is working on a Memorandum of Understanding with Nomas Global Investments LLC S.P.C, a solely owned SPV of His Highness Shaikh Mohammed Bin Sultan Bin Hamdan Al Nahyan of Abu Dhabi’s Royal Family, dated 17 March 2025, to secure a dual-listing of Diginex’s securities on the Abu Dhabi Securities Exchange. The aim is to expand Diginex’s business in the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) and a potential capital raise for Diginex of up to USD$250 million focused on large institutional investors in the GCC. The process is ongoing and is expected to take a few more months to list the Company’s shares on the ADX. The potential capital raise is likely to occur after the listing of Diginex’s shares on the ADX. His Highness and Nomas are actively supporting Diginex in this endeavor.

data.title: Energy Vault (NYSE: NRGV) grants 371,659 shares to 7 employees under 2022 Employment Inducement Award Plan.
data.description: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. revealed that on July 30, 2025, 7 new non-executive employees were granted restricted stock unit awards for 371,659 shares of its common stock by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors. This move was made under the Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. 2022 Employment Inducement Award Plan.

data.title: Immersion Corporation (Nasdaq: IMMR) received Nasdaq alert for failing to file Form 10-K by April 30, 2025.
data.description: In Aventura, Florida, Immersion Corporation, a prominent haptics technology provider traded on Nasdaq under the symbol IMMR, disclosed on August 20, 2025, that it was issued a delinquency compliance alert notice by Nasdaq. The notice highlighted the Company's failure to submit its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year concluding on April 30, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Enterprise completes acquisition of Occidental's natural gas gathering affiliate in Permian Basin for $580 million in cash.
data.description: In Houston, Enterprise Products Partners L.P. (NYSE: EPD) disclosed the completion of its acquisition of Occidental's natural gas gathering affiliate in a debt-free deal worth $580 million in cash. The acquired assets consist of specific natural gas gathering systems located in the Midland Basin and roughly 200 miles of natural gas gathering pipelines that bolster Occidental's production endeavors in the region.
